div.p: Logical Target: 10,000 blocks | Arch: Ext4-style Indirect Blocks | Block: 4KB Algorithm: Multi-level Page Table Walk equivalent for FS

ul.li: Result: Physical block pointer to L2 Indirect Block
Result: Physical block pointer for Raw User Data

ol.li: Block Layer: Issue bio_submit() to disk.
Hardware: DMA transfer from disk to kernel page cache.
User-space: Data available in read() buffer.
